privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic meal database with 5 meals created inline in setup_task.sh. Daily macro targets are 180g protein, 220g carbs, and 60g fats, with verifier acceptance of ±5g per macro. Task requires 5-day meal plan with minimum 3 unique meals and portion multipliers between 0.5-3.0x. Verifier checks 8 criteria: structure complete, formulas implemented, and three macro targets met within ranges (protein 175-185g, carbs 215-225g, fats 55-65g). Real-world nutritional data shows some meal values are elevated compared to typical servings (particularly Greek pasta salad protein at 28g vs typical 6-12g, and beef stir-fry carbs at 42g vs typical 0-22g), but all values are plausible for larger/adjusted portions.
